hero.title: Sintam-se Abraçados
hero.subtitle: A Lisbon-based team delivering disciplined property management, investment support, and vehicle services.

whoWeAre.text: Sintam-se Abraçados is a Lisbon-based company providing comprehensive property management, investment consulting, and vehicle services. We operate with discipline, transparency, and a focus on measurable outcomes.

whatWeDo.propertyManagementText: We manage residential and commercial properties in Lisbon and surrounding areas. Our services include rent collection, maintenance coordination, inspections, compliance oversight, and transparent reporting.
whatWeDo.investmentConsultingText: We support investors in sourcing, evaluating, and acquiring properties in Portugal. From market analysis to due diligence and negotiation, we provide structured guidance throughout the investment process.
whatWeDo.vehicleServicesText: We offer vehicle rental and sourcing services, including import from Belgium to Lisbon and export to Angola. Our team handles sourcing, inspection, documentation, and logistics coordination.

ourApproach.paragraph1: Based in Lisbon, we combine local market expertise with international standards. Our team provides multilingual support in English and Portuguese, ensuring clear communication with clients from around the world.
ourApproach.paragraph2: We prioritize trust and transparency in every interaction. Our processes are designed for clarity, with regular reporting, defined SLAs, and direct access to decision-makers. We work with vetted partners and maintain rigorous quality standards across all services.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.text: Straight reporting, clear decisions, and visible ownership of tasks.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.text: Predictable execution with defined SLAs and responsive communication.

expertise.title: Expertise
expertise.text: Local market knowledge backed by vetted partners in legal, tax, and operations.

clientFocus.title: Client focus
clientFocus.text: We align to your targets—income, protection, and asset longevity.

hero.title: Property management for Lisbon assets
hero.subtitle: Disciplined oversight for income, compliance, maintenance, and residents. One accountable team managing the full lifecycle of your property.

section.title: Keeping your building safe, clean, and compliant.

routineMaintenance.title: Routine Maintenance
routineMaintenance.text: We keep communal areas safe, clean, and looking good. Our team handles the landscaping, lighting, cleaning, and minor repairs to maintain a safe environment for residents.

plannedPreventative.title: Planned Preventative Maintenance (PPM)
plannedPreventative.text: Our scheduled inspections catch issues early, keeping critical systems and communal areas in good condition.

emergencyRepairs.title: Emergency Repairs
emergencyRepairs.text: When urgent issues arise, our emergency repair service promptly tackles leaks, electrical faults, and structural concerns to protect residents and limit property damage.

hero.title: Structured investment support in Lisbon
hero.subtitle: From scouting to closing, we provide disciplined support for acquisitions, aligning each stage with your return and risk profile.

section.title: Make confident property decisions in Portugal.
section.intro: We help you assess opportunities, coordinate the process, and reduce risk throughout your property investment journey in Portugal.

strategyGuidance.title: Investment Strategy & Area Guidance
strategyGuidance.text: We help you define your goals and narrow down the right areas in Lisbon and beyond based on budget, yield expectations, and long-term plans.

propertySearch.title: Property Search & Shortlisting
propertySearch.text: We source options that match your criteria, highlight trade-offs clearly, and save you time by focusing only on properties worth viewing.

dueDiligence.title: Due Diligence & Purchase Coordination
dueDiligence.text: We support the process by coordinating viewings, documentation, and trusted local partners (legal/tax/finance where needed) so you can move forward with clarity.

section.disclaimer: Note: We do not provide legal or tax advice. We coordinate with qualified professionals where required.

hero.title: Car Hire in Portugal.
hero.subtitle: Search for car hire deals in Portugal

overview.title: Service overview
overview.description: We manage the full rental lifecycle: sourcing, insurance, handover, maintenance, and support. Your team receives a ready-to-drive vehicle with minimal friction.

included.deliveryCollection: Delivery and collection in greater Lisbon
included.maintenanceIncluded: Maintenance and servicing included for long-term

cta.title: Call to action
cta.description: Share dates, vehicle type, and delivery preferences. We will confirm availability quickly.

vehiclesAvailable.a: We source sedans, SUVs, and vans. Specific models are confirmed during booking based on availability and your requirements.

corporateRental.q: Can you handle corporate rental needs?
corporateRental.a: Yes. We support corporate fleets, relocation packages, and project-based rentals.

manageInsurance.a: We arrange coverage and present options clearly, with documentation handled for you.

deliveryIncluded.a: Yes, within greater Lisbon. We coordinate timing and handover details.

hero.title: Vehicle sourcing from Belgium
hero.subtitle: Import to Lisbon or export to Angola. We source, inspect, and coordinate the full process.

intro.title: Sourcing vehicles from Belgium
intro.description: We source vehicles from Belgian markets and coordinate import to Lisbon or export to Angola. Our process covers market scanning, vehicle inspection, negotiation, documentation, and logistics. Whether you need a single vehicle or a fleet, we handle the sourcing and shipping arrangements.

defineRequirements.title: Define requirements
defineRequirements.description: Share your vehicle specifications, budget, and destination preferences.

marketScan.title: Market scan
marketScan.description: We search Belgian markets and shortlist vehicles matching your criteria.

inspectionValidation.title: Inspection & validation
inspectionValidation.description: Our team inspects vehicles, verifies history, and negotiates terms.

importExport.title: Import or export coordination
importExport.description: We handle documentation, shipping, and registration for Lisbon or Angola.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.description: Vehicle arrives ready for collection or delivery to your specified location.

marketplace.title: Available vehicles
marketplace.description: Browse vehicles currently available for sourcing from Belgium. Contact us to enquire about any listing.

details.enquiryMessage: I'm interested in the {{make}} {{model}} (ID: {{id}}). Please provide more details and availability.

cta.title: Need a specific vehicle?
cta.description: Contact us with your requirements. We'll source it from Belgium and coordinate import or export.

hero.title: Where we operate
hero.subtitle: Lisbon at the center, with coverage across key surrounding municipalities through vetted partners and controlled processes.

locationPage.title: Looking for professional block management services in {{location}}?
locationPage.defaultMessage: Hi, I'm enquiring about services in {{location}}.

descriptions.lisbon: As our base of operations, we provide comprehensive property management and investment services across Lisbon's central districts and surrounding neighborhoods. From historic Alfama to modern Parque das Nações, we understand the local market and regulatory landscape.
descriptions.cascais: Coastal property management and investment support in Cascais, serving the luxury residential market and long-term rental needs. We handle relocations, seasonal rentals, and property maintenance for owners in this premium coastal area.
descriptions.sintra: Heritage property management and compliance oversight in Sintra. We work with historic assets, ensuring regulatory compliance while preserving the character of properties in this UNESCO World Heritage area.
descriptions.oeiras: Corporate housing and commuter-friendly property services in Oeiras. We support relocating professionals and companies with short-term and long-term rental solutions, plus ongoing property maintenance.
descriptions.almada: Property management and investment services in Almada, expanding our coverage to the south bank of the Tagus. We work with vetted local partners to deliver the same high standards across the region.

hero.title: Talk to us
hero.subtitle: We respond within one business day.

success.title: Message received
success.message: Thank you. We will respond within one business day. If you prefer, use the mail link below.

cookie.learnMore: Learn more in our Privacy Policy

whatsapp.message: Hello, I'd like to enquire about your services in Lisbon

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We collect information you provide through contact forms, email, or phone, including name, email, phone, and service interests. We use this to respond to enquiries, deliver services, and maintain records.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.text: We collect information you provide when contacting us, including name, email, phone number, and messages.

dataUse.title: Data use
dataUse.text: Your data is used to communicate with you, prepare proposals, perform services, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your data.

dataProtection.title: Data protection
dataProtection.text: We apply reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your information. Access is restricted to authorised personnel and trusted processors.

yourRights.title: Your rights
yourRights.text: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data. Contact info@sintam-se-abracados.pt to exercise these rights.
